name: loreloop
description: Use LoreLoop's governed project knowledge and evidence loop inside Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Governed project knowledge and evidence-backed delivery.
interface.longDescription: Keep working in Codex while LoreLoop prepares trusted project knowledge, records evidence-backed acceptance, and returns accepted outcomes to the knowledge base.
